mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, WRITER AS writer, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, CREATED_DTTM AS createdDttm, UPDATED_DTTM AS updatedDttm, IS_DELETED AS isDeleted FROM TB_LEARNING_BOARD

SELECT BOARD_ID AS boardId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, WRITER AS writer, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, CREATED_DTTM AS createdDttm, UPDATED_DTTM AS updatedDttm, IS_DELETED AS isDeleted FROM TB_LEARNING_BOARD WHERE TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR WRITER LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
